column1: Yordan Alvarez stands out as the top pick, showing excellent consistency with a hit in 80% of his games and a favorable matchup against Chris Bassitt, plus a slight park boost. Elly De La Cruz offers similar reliability and also benefits from a platoon advantage at home, making him a strong secondary option. Juan Soto’s steady approach and high percentage of games with a hit keep him firmly in play for Beat The Streak selections.
